analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + right_sided_primary + kras_mutation + nras_mutation + braf_v600e + msi_high + her2_amplified + ntrk_fusion + cea_ng_ml + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + crp_mg_l + nlr + treatment_cetuximab + treatment_bevacizumab + treatment_pembrolizumab + treatment_encorafenib + treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib + treatment_regorafenib + hemoglobin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + ast_u_l + alt_u_l + total_bilirubin_mg_dl + creatinine_mg_dl + bun_mg_dl + sodium_meq_l + potassium_meq_l + calcium_mg_dl + glucose_mg_dl + platelets_k_ul + wbc_k_ul + anc_k_ul + alc_k_ul + ca_125_u_ml + psa_ng_ml + tsh_uiu_ml + inr + bmi + systolic_bp_mmhg + diastolic_bp_mmhg + heart_rate_bpm + spo2_pct + diabetes_mellitus + hypertension + copd + chronic_kidney_disease + heart_failure + coronary_artery_disease + atrial_fibrillation + venous_thromboembolism_history + autoimmune_disease + hepatitis_b_history + hepatitis_c_history + hiv_positive + prior_malignancy + depression_anxiety_diagnosis + interstitial_lung_disease_history + liver_mets + bone_mets + adrenal_mets + pleural_effusion + pericardial_effusion + contralateral_lung_mets + her2_amplification + met_exon14_skipping + ret_fusion + ros1_fusion + nrg1_fusion
analyses.result_summary: All-variable model across 73 predictors had R-squared 0.859; the adjusted stage_iv coefficient was -1.36 months (SE 0.01, p=<1e-300).

analyses.code: All-variable OLS treatment coefficient review
analyses.result_summary: All-variable adjusted treatment coefficients showed the largest positive treatment signal for treatment_regorafenib: treatment_cetuximab beta -0.01 (p=0.189); treatment_bevacizumab beta 0.00 (p=0.797); treatment_pembrolizumab beta 0.00 (p=0.992); treatment_encorafenib beta 0.01 (p=0.605); treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib beta 0.03 (p=0.0718); treatment_regorafenib beta 0.94 (p=<1e-300).
